items.markdown:
![Dead battery? Be careful your jumpstart isn't going to make ...](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/07210054-2120-0139-0000-54d27b283c60:12)
Jump-starting a car `requires a working vehicle and a set of jumper cables` . Park the cars face-to-face without letting them touch, and turn both ignitions off. Connect the cables in this exact order: positive (red) to the dead battery, positive (red) to the good battery, negative (black) to the good battery, and negative (black) to unpainted metal on the dead car.[](https://www.consumerreports.org/cars/car-batteries/jump-start-car-with-dead-battery-a1028630350/) [[1]](https://www.consumerreports.org/cars/car-batteries/jump-start-car-with-dead-battery-a1028630350/)

For a clear, step-by-step visual demonstration on how to attach the jumper cables safely and avoid sparks, watch this short tutorial:[![](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/07210054-2120-0139-0000-54d27b283c60:13)
![Related video thumbnail](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/07210054-2120-0139-0000-54d27b283c60:14)
1m](https://www.instagram.com/reel/DM0fl_BRLES/?hl=en) [Jump Start Car 🚗⚡️ #MACKanics 120K views  · 11 months ago![](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/07210054-2120-0139-0000-54d27b283c60:15)
Instagram · Mack Hollins](https://www.instagram.com/reel/DM0fl_BRLES/?hl=en) 

The Step-by-Step Process

1. **Position the cars:** Park the two cars close enough so the jumper cables can reach between both batteries, but ensure the vehicles are not touching each other.[](https://www.consumerreports.org/cars/car-batteries/jump-start-car-with-dead-battery-a1028630350/) [[1]](https://www.consumerreports.org/cars/car-batteries/jump-start-car-with-dead-battery-a1028630350/)
2. **Turn off the engines:** Turn off the ignition in both vehicles and engage the parking brake . Pop the hoods and locate the batteries.[](https://www.kbb.com/car-advice/how-to-jump-start-battery/) [[1]](https://www.kbb.com/car-advice/how-to-jump-start-battery/)[[2]](https://www.consumerreports.org/cars/car-batteries/jump-start-car-with-dead-battery-a1028630350/)
3. **Red on Dead:** Attach one red (positive) clamp to the positive terminal (+) of the dead battery.[](https://www.kbb.com/car-advice/how-to-jump-start-battery/) [[1]](https://www.kbb.com/car-advice/how-to-jump-start-battery/)
4. **Red on Good:** Attach the other red (positive) clamp to the positive terminal (+) of the working (donor) battery.[](https://www.kbb.com/car-advice/how-to-jump-start-battery/) [[1]](https://www.kbb.com/car-advice/how-to-jump-start-battery/)
5. **Black on Good:** Connect one black (negative) clamp to the negative terminal (-) of the working battery.[](https://www.kbb.com/car-advice/how-to-jump-start-battery/) [[1]](https://www.kbb.com/car-advice/how-to-jump-start-battery/)
6. **Ground on Dead:** Connect the final black (negative) clamp to an unpainted, solid metal part of the dead car’s engine block or chassis (this acts as a ground and minimizes sparks). *Never connect this to the negative terminal of the dead battery.* [](https://www.consumerreports.org/cars/car-batteries/jump-start-car-with-dead-battery-a1028630350/) [[1]](https://www.consumerreports.org/cars/car-batteries/jump-start-car-with-dead-battery-a1028630350/)[[2]](https://www.kbb.com/car-advice/how-to-jump-start-battery/)[[3]](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/8Y7NOw15zVo)[[4]](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/Bu9k4062hUY)
7. **Start the working car:** Start the engine of the vehicle with the good battery and let it run for 1 to 3 minutes.[](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YFFn5mYy16s&t=11) [[1]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YFFn5mYy16s&t=11)[[2]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gff7qXZWhaU&t=7)[[3]](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/8Y7NOw15zVo)
8. **Start the dead car:** Attempt to start the vehicle with the dead battery.[](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/8Y7NOw15zVo) [[1]](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/8Y7NOw15zVo)
9. **Remove the cables:** Once the dead car is running, remove the cables in the exact **reverse** order that you put them on (Black off the dead car, Black off the good car, Red off the good car, Red off the dead car). Make sure the clamps do not touch each other while you are doing this.[](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YFFn5mYy16s&t=11) [[1]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YFFn5mYy16s&t=11)[[2]](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/k2ZD4AwnqKQ)

Important Tips

- Do not immediately turn your engine off. Leave the newly started car running and drive it around for at least 15 to 30 minutes to allow the alternator to properly recharge the battery.
- If your car doesn't start, double-check your cable connections to ensure they are secure, and wait a few more minutes with the working car's engine running before trying again.
- For safety instructions specific to your make and model, it is always a good idea to consult your vehicle's owner manual.[](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YFFn5mYy16s&t=11) [[1]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YFFn5mYy16s&t=11)[[2]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gff7qXZWhaU&t=7)[[3]](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/wGkDaxONt4I)[[4]](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/8Y7NOw15zVo)[[5]](https://www.kbb.com/car-advice/how-to-jump-start-battery/)

If you prefer using a portable jump starter pack instead of relying on a donor vehicle, this video covers exactly how to do that safely:![Related video thumbnail](https://encrypted-tbn3.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcSBBGxLUEYrmOM-OyS2OtYGaIg7uH1cVlLs05JkXhBrbkWY01H1)

YouTube · CNMsuncats](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XvQoWEwxg2M&t=101)

Smart Trick to Jump-Start a Car Using Tools and a Battery! 💡🔧 #DIY #USA #CarRepair #AutoTips
Como arrancar un carro #automobile #tips #jumpercables #carjumpstarter #cartips

Most people know you can jump-start a dead battery. What many don't realize is that connecting the jumper cables in the wrong order can damage your car or create a serious safety risk.

The correct process is simple: connect the positive terminals first, then the negative terminal on the working battery, and attach the final clamp to an unpainted metal surface on the disabled vehicle.

It's a small skill that can save you from a costly mistake and get you back on the road in minutes. 🚗🔋

What's one life skill you think everyone should learn before graduating? 👇
How to Jump-Start a Motorcycle Without Damaging Your Battery | The Shop Manual

items.source: Mason Cordell, Jon Langston, Collin Morgan

items.title: ¿Cómo PASAR CORRIENTE de la MANERA CORRECTA? Video Explicativo

Knowing how to jump-start a car can save you from being stranded, but the cable order matters. First, connect the red (positive) cable to the dead battery, then connect the other red clamp to the good battery. Next, attach the black (negative) cable to the good battery, and finally connect the last black clamp to an unpainted metal surface on the disabled car, not the battery itself.

Once connected, start the working vehicle, wait a few minutes, then try starting the dead car. After it’s running, remove the cables in the reverse order. Using a metal grounding point for the final connection helps reduce the risk of sparks near the battery, making the process safer.

Let us know your thoughts below! 🚗🔋
